title: NSF Budget Justification Render — Output Contract
description: Word-pasteable rendering of the eight-section NSF budget-justification array. Emits a single JSON object with parallel Markdown and HTML strings of the same content. The Markdown string is intended for direct paste into a Word document (markdown symbols visible; user applies heading styles manually); the HTML string is intended for Word's Paste Special -> HTML path, which preserves heading and paragraph structure automatically.

markdown.description: Markdown rendering of the eight-section budget justification. Section titles render as level-1 ATX headings ('# Section A: Senior Personnel'). Section content is inserted verbatim from the input array, including any sub-subheadings (typically '###' under Section G). Exactly one blank line separates the section heading from its content and one blank line separates adjacent sections. The string ends with a single trailing newline.
